title: Does a Podio date value work a monday date column using zapier?
excerpt: Using Zapier, will a Podio date/time value work with a monday date column? Currently using a text column for this podio value. I am asking before I reach out to my admin to implement the new column

posts.author: dfurt (Daniel Furtick)
posts.cookedHtml: Using Zapier, will a Podio date/time value work with a monday date column? Currently using a text column for this podio value. I am asking before I reach out to my admin to implement the new column
